name: @goldfinch/feature-reports
description: GoldFinch reports feature (PHASE7-DECISIONS P7-4/P7-7): net-worth history line chart stating its accrual start date, monthly income/spend/net trend bars over a selectable 3/6/12-month window, and a per-month income -> category flow diagram. Everything groups strictly per currency, never a synthetic mixed-currency total. Lives inside the @goldfinch/app Expo workspace; not an independent npm workspace.
